recommendations.title: Most Active Directories
recommendations.detail: The directories receiving the most attention are `README.md`, `market_prediction`, `sp_closing_projection`. Consider adding tests or documentation to these areas.

recommendations.title: Commit Rhythm
recommendations.detail: Most commits land on **Wednesday**; **Wednesday** sees the least activity. Distributing work more evenly can reduce integration risk.

recommendations.title: Peak Commit Hour
recommendations.detail: The peak commit hour is **21:00 UTC**. Scheduling code reviews shortly after this window means reviewers see fresh context.

recommendations.title: Dominant File Types
recommendations.detail: The most-changed file types are **.md, .json, .png**. Ensure linting and CI coverage exists for each type.

recommendations.title: Update-Heavy Repo
recommendations.detail: Heavy `update` usage may hide unrelated changes. Aim for atomic, single-purpose commits.
